arts.ttl: Rayo Vallecano pushing hard to sign Bundesliga striker on loan
arts.sum: Rayo Vallecano have had a relatively good season up until now, as they sit in 13th position in the La Liga table. However, they will have ambitions to go higher, and if they can strengthen during the winter transfer window, they are more than capable of making a push for the European places. Scoring goals […] The post Rayo Vallecano pushing hard to sign Bundesliga striker on loan appeared first on Football España.
